stonetop.summary: A ghost-ridden corpse that lurches after marrow and the weak.

system.concept: A ghost-ridden corpse that lurches after marrow and the weak.
system.description: When an untethered ghost or a shade possesses an empty corpse, it becomes a pyped. They are wretched things, all rotting flesh and lurching movements, hungering for sweet marrow, scavenging on carrion and graves. But hunger can make them bold — bold enough to hunt the weak and sick at the edge of a village, or a lone traveler caught unawares. Pypeds rise only from relatively intact corpses that have not undergone proper funeral rites.
